gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/167)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/167)
text: السَّمْنُ مَا دَخَلَ جَوْفاً مِثْلُهُ وَ إِنَّنِي لَأَكْرَهُهُ لِلشَّيْخِ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Muhammad Bin Bundar, from Ahmad Bin Abu Abdullah, from his father, from the one who mentioned it, from Abu Hafs Al Abbar,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The margarine, nothing like it enters the inside, and I<sup>asws</sup> dislike it for the old man’.
en.sarwar: 6. Ali ibn Muhammad ibn Bandar has narrated from Ahmad ibn abu ‘Abd Allah from his father from those whom he has mentioned from abu Hafs al-Abbar who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Nothing entering inside is (as good) as ghee but I dislike it for an old man.’”
